steps.title: Compute the cutoff list
steps.content: All four choices use the same $x$-values, so use a Desmos list. For $x=3$, $5$, and $8$, the boundary values from $13x-18$ are $21$, $47$, and $86$.

steps.title: Test the correct table at once
steps.content: The matching choice has $y$-values $26$, $52$, and $91$. Enter $d_1=[26,52,91]$ and compare it to the cutoff list. Each value is greater than the matching boundary value: $26\gt 21$, $52\gt 47$, and $91\gt 86$.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: A correct table must satisfy the strict inequality in all three rows. the only table whose entire $y$-list is above $13x-18$, so D is correct.
